===={{game|HeartGold and SoulSilver|s}}==== =====Given to the player===== After defeating {{ga|Red}} and receiving a [[Kanto first partner Pokémon]] from [[Professor Oak]], Steven gives one of these Pokémon to the player. He asks the {{player}} what stone do they like the most (green, red, or blue). The stone's color corresponds to the received [[Hoenn first partner Pokémon]]. {{Pokémon/Grid}} {{Pokémon |caption='''Green stone''' |gen=4 |ndex=0252 |pokemon=Treecko |gender=both |level=5 |type1=Grass |ability=Overgrow |move1=Pound|move1type=Normal|move1cat=Physical |move2=Leer|move2type=Normal|move2cat=Status}} {{Pokémon |caption='''Red stone''' |gen=4 |ndex=0255 |spritegender=male |gender=both |pokemon=Torchic |level=5 |type1=Fire |ability=Blaze |move1=Scratch|move1type=Normal|move1cat=Physical |move2=Growl|move2type=Normal|move2cat=Status}} {{Pokémon |caption='''Blue stone''' |gen=4 |ndex=0258 |pokemon=Mudkip |gender=both |level=5 |type1=Water |ability=Torrent |move1=Tackle|move1type=Normal|move1cat=Physical |move2=Growl|move2type=Normal|move2cat=Status}} {{Pokémon/Grid/end}} =====[[Trade]]d to the player===== After speaking to Steven at the [[Pewter Museum of Science]], he will return to the [[Silph Co.]] building, where he will trade the player a {{p|Beldum}} in exchange for a {{p|Forretress}}. {{Gen4ievent |pokemon=Beldum |nick=Iron |ndex=0374 |ball=Poké |type=Steel|type2=Psychic |ot={{color|0070f8|Steven}} |id=23478 |nature=Brave |item=Dawn Stone |met=a link trade
({{color2|000|Silph Co.}}) |hpiv=28 |atkiv=29 |defiv=24 |spaiv=24 |spdiv=25 |speiv=23 |move1=Take Down|move1type=Normal|move1cat=Physical |ability=Clear Body |gift=yes |trade=yes |method=[[In-game trade]] ({{p|Forretress}}) |game=hgss |shinylock=yes }}
